side_effects.description: Huge welts flared up on previous injection sites (both butt cheeks and stomach)
Histamine reaction with itching on hands, feet, and face; watery eyes

protocol_notes: User has been cycling MOTS over the course of a year from the same source with no prior issues. The allergic/histamine reaction occurred when MOTS was taken together with NAD, and then again when MOTS was taken alone. Welts appeared specifically at previous injection sites.
